business_question: Which stores experience the highest sales volatility month over month?
business_context: Operations teams want to identify stores with unstable demand patterns.
sql_answer:
WITH monthly_sales AS (
SELECT
st.STORE_KEY,
st.STORE_NAME,
d.YEAR,
d.MONTH,
SUM(s.NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS MONTHLY_SALES
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_STORE st
ON s.STORE_KEY = st.STORE_KEY
JOIN DIM_DATE d
ON s.DATE_KEY = d.DATE_KEY
GROUP BY
st.STORE_KEY,
st.STORE_NAME,
d.YEAR,
d.MONTH
),

store_volatility AS (
SELECT
STORE_KEY,
STORE_NAME,
AVG(MONTHLY_SALES) AS AVG_MONTHLY_SALES,
STDDEV(MONTHLY_SALES) AS SALES_STDDEV
FROM monthly_sales
GROUP BY
STORE_KEY,
STORE_NAME
)

SELECT
STORE_NAME,
ROUND(AVG_MONTHLY_SALES,2) AS AVG_MONTHLY_SALES,
ROUND(SALES_STDDEV,2) AS SALES_STDDEV,
ROUND(
SALES_STDDEV * 100 /
NULLIF(AVG_MONTHLY_SALES,0),
2
) AS VOLATILITY_PCT
FROM store_volatility
ORDER BY VOLATILITY_PCT DESC;
